name: ogefmeeting
description: Application web de gestion et intelligence des réunions — OGEFREM

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.build:backend:render: npm run build -w @ogefmeeting/shared && npm run build -w @ogefmeeting/backend
scripts.build:frontend:vercel: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w @ogefmeeting/frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w frontend && npm run lint -w backend
